description: Address semantic review issues: stale cookie after seller registration, category/condition not persisted, text length validation, slug collision for non-Latin titles, and role escalation safeguard comment
steps: In registerAsSeller (product-actions.ts), after role upgrade, refresh the user-role cookie by importing cookies from next/headers and setting it directly.
In seller-product-form.tsx handleSubmit, add category and condition to FormData. In createProduct, read them and store category in metadata.category and condition in metadata.condition.
In createProduct, add validation for title max 200 chars and description max 10000 chars.
Improve generateSlug: if base is empty after stripping non-alphanumeric chars (e.g. Khmer script), use 'product' as the base. Use crypto.randomUUID().slice(0, 8) as suffix instead of Date.now().
Add a comment in registerAsSeller noting the role escalation is acceptable for now since only 'seller' is hardcoded.
acceptance_criteria: registerAsSeller sets user-role cookie to 'seller' after successful role upgrade
createProduct reads category and condition from FormData and stores them in metadata JSONB
createProduct rejects title > 200 chars and description > 10000 chars
generateSlug falls back to 'product' when base is empty and uses UUID suffix
seller-product-form.tsx includes category and condition in submitted FormData
pnpm lint passes with no errors
npx tsc --noEmit passes with no type errors
findings: All 5 review issues addressed. pnpm lint and tsc --noEmit both pass cleanly. The metadata JSONB column on products table supports storing category and condition. Cookie refresh uses the same options pattern as auth-actions.ts.
